onboarding.title: Complete onboarding, then enter the feedback workspace.
onboarding.description: The portal now supports the full student entry path: registration, email confirmation, document upload, approval waiting, and sign-in to the survey area.

highlights.createAccount: Create an account with your student information
highlights.verifyDocuments: Verify your email and upload required documents
highlights.accessSurveys: Log in after approval to access assigned surveys

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in with your registered account to access the survey workspace.

errors.accountPending: Your account is pending review and cannot sign in yet.
errors.accountRejected: Your account was rejected. Sign in again to review feedback and resubmit corrected documents.
errors.accountInactive: Your account is inactive. Complete verification or contact an administrator.
errors.unavailable: Unable to sign in right now.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Register as a student using the same information stored in the current university system.
register.emailVerificationNotice: The system will send a verification email to your inbox. Open that email, click the verification link, then sign in to upload your documents.

errors.unavailable: Unable to create your account right now.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account. The reset link can only be used for a limited time.
resetPassword.successNotice: Password updated successfully. Sign in with your new password.

errors.unavailable: Unable to reset password right now.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send a reset link if the account exists.

errors.unavailable: Unable to process the request right now.

changePassword.title: Password security
changePassword.description: Change your password from this self-service security area. Use a unique password that you do not reuse for other systems.

form.title: Change password
form.description: Enter your current password and choose a new password for this account.

help.password: Use at least 6 characters. Prefer a unique password not used in other systems.

guidance.title: Security guidance
guidance.description: Keep this account separate from administrative management of other users.
guidance.accountScope: This area is for your own authenticated account only. Managing other people's accounts remains part of Admin Users and is intentionally separated from personal self-service.
guidance.afterSuccess: After a successful password change, continue using this account area for self-service security tasks rather than operational navigation.

errors.title: Password update failed
errors.unavailable: Unable to change password right now.

title.resubmission: Correct and resubmit your verification documents

description.upload: Submit both document images so your student account can move into the approval queue.
description.resubmission: Your previous onboarding review was rejected. Fix the issues below and resubmit both documents.

noticeText.upload: After upload, your account will move into the pending approval queue until an administrator reviews and activates it.
noticeText.resubmission: After resubmission, your account will return to the pending review queue until an administrator reviews the corrected documents.

notices.uploaded: Documents uploaded successfully. Your account is now pending administrator approval.
notices.resubmitted: Documents resubmitted successfully. Your account is back in the administrator review queue.

errors.statusUnavailable: Unable to load your onboarding status right now.
errors.unavailable: Unable to upload your documents right now.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your student account
verifyEmail.description: We confirm your email before allowing you to sign in and upload your verification documents.
verifyEmail.successNextStep: Email verification is complete. Your next step is to sign in, upload your student card image and national ID image, then wait for administrator approval.

errors.unavailable: Unable to verify email right now.
